summary: Completed and failed as expected. The first three boot attempts were U-Boot-only false starts caused by zero-byte /boot/cthu DTB/config/manifest files after an unsynced manual install; after reinstalling and syncing, U-Boot loaded 4761 bytes of DTB and fdt addr succeeded. The real H025 boot reached Linux 7.1.0-rc5-00281-gf0114b15f40a and mmcblk0. H025 removed NSI IAG reads from the behavior path, then proved both minimum NSI writes landed: CCU 0x580 0x43000005->0xc3000005 and CCU 0x584 0x00010000->0x00010001. The run reached dma-entry, descriptor setup, command launch, idma-post-cmdr, and after-cpu-sync. The descriptor stayed unchanged with checksum 0x433b7131, OWN set, CHDA=DLBA=0x3e800000, CBDA=0, IDST=0x4000, CBCR=0x400, and BBCR=0. This closes the minimum NSI bits as a standalone fix.
